```

<tool_code>
```python
# 从OCR数据提取的2020年各州失业保险税数据（单位：千美元）
# 已排除DC
ui_taxes = {
    'Alabama': 64332,
    'Alaska': 10983,
    'Arizona': 109606,
    'Arkansas': 122270,
    'California': 735828,
    'Colorado': 97255,
    'Connecticut': 64286,
    'Delaware': 27166,
    'Florida': 417974,
    'Georgia': 222639,
    'Hawaii': 17231,
    'Idaho': 34037,
    'Illinois': 271859,
    'Indiana': 100945,
    'Iowa': 49175,
    'Kansas': 66239,
    'Kentucky': 61165,
    'Louisiana': 62871,
    'Maine': 18204,
    'Maryland': 101598,
    'Massachusetts': 161146,
    'Michigan': 178509,
    'Minnesota': 170442,
    'Mississippi': 31420,
    'Missouri': 119199,
    'Montana': 15993,
    'Nebraska': 35205,
    'Nevada': 45885,
    'New Hampshire': 20345,
    'New Jersey': 187735,
    'New Mexico': 19766,
    'New York': 350082,
    'North Carolina': 190438,
    'North Dakota': 12812,
    'Ohio': 235458,
    'Oklahoma': 60206,
    'Oregon': 71863,
    'Pennsylvania': 257446,
    'Rhode Island': 25975,
    'South Carolina': 65892,
    'South Dakota': 12334,
    'Tennessee': 169376,
    'Texas': 536530,
    'Utah': 60537,
    'Vermont': 8471,
    'Virginia': 162666,
    'Washington': 209293,
    'West Virginia': 13475,
    'Wisconsin': 117667,
    'Wyoming': 7638,
}

import numpy as np

# 验证州数量
n = len(ui_taxes)
print(f"州/地区数量: {n} (排除DC后应为50)")

# 按税金额降序排列
values = sorted(ui_taxes.values(), reverse=True)
n = len(values)

# 方法1：线性回归法
ranks = np.arange(1, n + 1)
log_ranks = np.log(ranks)
log_values = np.log(values)

# 最小二乘法拟合: ln(freq) = -α * ln(rank) + c
coef = np.polyfit(log_ranks, log_values, 1)
α = -coef[0]
c = coef[1]

# 计算R²
y_pred = -α * log_ranks + c
ss_res = np.sum((log_values - y_pred) ** 2)
ss_tot = np.sum((log_values - np.mean(log_values)) ** 2)
r_squared = 1 - (ss_res / ss_tot)

print(f"州数量: {n}")
print(f"线性回归法 Zipf 指数: {α:.4f}")
print(f"R²: {r_squared:.4f}")
```
</tool_code>
